About Me

A little about my journey

I completed my HSC in Humanities and SSC in Science from Mafsar Ul-Ulum Alim Madrasah. Since September 2024, I've worked as a Manpower & Accounted Assistant Officer at MIM International, working daily with ERP software, MS Office, and office record-keeping. Alongside my job, I enjoy building small digital tools — registration forms, attendance trackers, and websites — to solve everyday problems at work and in my community.

2024–PresentMIM International

Side Projects

Digital Systems Built

Small tools I've built to make office and community work simpler.

Event Registration Form

A structured online form for collecting attendee registrations for a community event, replacing paper sign-up sheets.

🔗 Live Demo — coming soon 💻 GitHub — coming soon

Office Attendance System

A simple daily attendance tracker to log staff check-ins for office use, cutting down on manual register-keeping.

🔗 Live Demo — coming soon 💻 GitHub — coming soon

Samity (Association) Website

A website for a local samity to publish notices, member information, and activities to a wider audience online.

🔗 Live Demo — coming soon 💻 GitHub — coming soon
